'''Arhul Holt''' served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] as a [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]]<ref name="CSWE" /> for nearly four decades, but eventually found that he no longer agreed with its principles. Going against seven centuries of [[Holt family|family]] tradition, he defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] with the help of a Rebel commando team and the young [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] [[Pash Galae]]. His defection spurred several equally high-ranked Rebel sympathizers to follow suit, resulting in a massive embarrassment to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Fleet]] and the sidelining of [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] as a political player in [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] Empire, in favor of other worlds such as [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].
